analyst_briefing: No capability tier reviews possible due to absent capability_registry. EU AI Act shows slippage on high-risk enforcement (AGM-2026-05-09-004) via standards delays and proposed Digital Omnibus postponement, offset by acceleration in AI-generated content Code of Practice (AGM-2026-05-09-005) and on-track GPAI enforcement (AGM-2026-05-09-006). Risk vectors match/escalate on Standards Vacuum, Regulatory Fragmentation, Cyber Escalation (97% autonomous LRM jailbreaks, AGM-2026-05-09-001), Export Controls (China Manus block/DeepSeek Ascend, AGM-2026-05-09-003/007), Platform Power, AI Energy Demand. Lab postures: Anthropic tempo increase (Opus 4.6 + Google funding), DeepSeek hardware independence, OpenAI bio jailbreak focus. Escalations to esa (x2 tech sovereignty), erm (energy), fcw/wdm (low urgency labeling). All findings source-verified; no contests. Conservative thresholds applied: single-lab claims assessed not confirmed.
